<style id="wp-custom-css">
/* ===============================
   【共通テキスト：lp-text】
=============================== */
.lp-text {
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.8;
  color: #333;
}

/* ===============================
   【特定ブロックを左寄せに：lp-left】
=============================== */
.lp-left .elementor-heading-title,
.lp-left .lp-text {
  text-align: left !important;
}

/* ===============================
   【SNSアイコン：lp-social】
=============================== */
.lp-social {
  display: flex;
  gap: 12px;
  justify-content: center;
}

/* ===============================
   【申し込みボタン：btn-primary】
=============================== */
.elementor-widget-button.btn-primary .elementor-button {
  background-color: #003399;
  color: #fff;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 12px 24px;
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 22px;
}
.elementor-widget-button.btn-primary .elementor-button:hover {
  background-color: #0a0099;
}

/* ===============================
   【電話ボタン：btn-secondary】
=============================== */
.elementor-widget-button.btn-secondary .elementor-button {
  background-color: #4169e1;
  color: #fff;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 12px 24px;
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 22px;
}
.elementor-widget-button.btn-secondary .elementor-button:hover {
  background-color: #274bdb;
}

/* ===============================
   【区切り線：lp-divider】
=============================== */
.lp-divider {
  border-top: 1px solid #333;
  margin: 48px auto;
  max-width: 720px;
}

/* ===============================
   【見出し補正：h1-h6共通調整】
=============================== */
.lp-text h1 { font-size: 48px; font-weight: bold; }
.lp-text h2 { font-size: 40px; font-weight: bold; }
.lp-text h3 { font-size: 32px; font-weight: bold; }
.lp-text h4 { font-size: 26px; font-weight: bold; }
.lp-text h5 { font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold; }
.lp-text h6 {
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: normal;  /* 太さ：普通 */
  text-align: center;   /* 中央揃え */
}


/* ===============================
   【Googleマップ：lp-map】
=============================== */
.lp-map {
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
}
.lp-map iframe {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  border: none;
}

/* ===============================
   【上下スペーサー：lp-space】
=============================== */
.lp-space {
  display: block;
  height: 48px;
}

/* ===============================
   【開催場所タイトル：lp-title-center】
=============================== */
.lp-title-center {
  text-align: center;
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 18px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

/* ===============================
   【小見出し装飾：lp-title-line】
=============================== */
.lp-title-line {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #333;
  padding-bottom: 0.3em;
  margin: 1.5em 0 1em;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;
  display: inline-block;
}

/* ===============================
   【主催・担当者エリア：lp-note-center】
=============================== */
.lp-note-center {
  font-size: 20px;
  color: #333;
  text-align: center;
  line-height: 1.6;
  font-weight: bold;
}

/* ===============================
   【推薦文：lp-note-img】
   担当者画像を丸抜き表示＆レスポンシブ対応
=============================== */
.lp-note-img img {
  width: 120px;
  height: 120px;
  object-fit: cover;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: block;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .lp-note-img img {
    width: 100px;
    height: 100px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .lp-note-img img {
    width: 90px;
    height: 90px;
  }
}

/* 強制表示対策（非表示になっていた場合） */
.lp-note-img {
  display: block !important;
  visibility: visible !important;
}
/* ===============================
   【ボックス囲み見出し：lp-box-title（青背景・白文字）】
=============================== */
.lp-box-title {
  background-color: #003399;   /* 濃い青背景 */
  color: #fff;                 /* 白文字 */
  padding: 12px 24px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 24px;
  font-weight: bold;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 2px solid #003399;   /* 同色の枠線で滑らかに */
  max-width: 100%;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

/* スマホ向けサイズ調整 */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .lp-box-title {
    font-size: 20px;
    padding: 10px 16px;
  }
}
/* ===============================
   【赤色文字・太字：lp-text-red-bold】
=============================== */
.lp-text-red-bold {
  color: #d60000;     /* 濃い赤 */
  font-weight: bold;  /* 太字 */
}

.smf-form-item:not(.is-required) .smf-badge--required {
  display: none !important;
}



</style>

<!-- Snow Monkey Forms → Google Tag Manager 連携コード -->
<script>
(function () {
  const targetClass = 'snow-monkey-form';

  // 方法1: MutationObserver で data-screen 変更を監視
  const observer = new MutationObserver(function (mutations) {
    mutations.forEach(function (mutation) {
      if (mutation.type === 'attributes' && mutation.attributeName === 'data-screen') {
        const form = mutation.target;
        
        console.log('data-screen changed:', form.dataset.screen);

        // snow-monkey-formクラスを持つかチェック
        if (!form.classList.contains(targetClass)) return;

        // 完了画面のみ処理
        if (form.dataset.screen === 'complete') {
          console.log('complete in');
          window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
          window.dataLayer.push({
            event: 'smf_submit',
            smf_form_id: form.id || ''
          });
          console.log('★広告用フォーム 完了 → smf_submit 発火:', form.id);
        }
      }
    });
  });

  // 全ての snow-monkey-form を監視対象に
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    document.querySelectorAll('.' + targetClass).forEach(function (form) {
      observer.observe(form, {
        attributes: true,
        attributeFilter: ['data-screen']
      });
    });
  });
})();
</script>

</div><!--wrapper-->
</body>
